properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The news came to Jesus, "Please come fast!" "Lazarus is sick and without your help Lord he will not last" Mary and Martha, watched their brother die They waited for Jesus, He did not come and they wondered why.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The death watch was over, buried four days Somebody said, "He'll soon be here, the Lord's on His way" Martha ran to Him, and then she cried "Lord if you had been here, You could have healed him, he'd still be alive"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: But You're four days late And all hope is gone Lord we don't understand why you waited so long But His way is God's way Not your's or mine And isn't it great, when He's four days late He's still on time!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus said "Martha, show me the grave" But she said "Lord, you don't understand, he's been there four days" The grave stone was rolled back Then Jesus cried "Lazarus come forth!" Then somebody said "He's alive, he's alive!"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We've heard a voice crying in this midnight hour Saying, Jesus is coming, To gather together and raise up his own. Some of us have met Him, and we know it is true Let's go, get the others, The Master is come and calleth for you.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You may be fighting, a battle of fear You cried to the Lord, I need you now But He has not appeared Friend don't be discouraged 'Cause He's still the same He'll soon be here, He'll roll back the stone And He'll call out your name!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: The master is here He's amongst us now He's broken the seal And calling your name He is raising you now No longer asleep, But quickened and raised United with Him For He's the resurrection and life! He's always on time!
